sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import './Templates.css'; const Templates: React.FC = () => { const templates = [ { id: 'alfred', name: 'Alfred', role: 'AI Executive Assistant', avatar: '/images/one.png', color: '#8B5CF6', skills: ['Schedule Calendar', 'Prioritize Tasks', 'Reply to Emails', 'Takes Notes'] }, { id: 'chip', name: 'Chip', role: 'AI Sales Representative', avatar: '/images/two.png', color: '#3B82F6', skills: ['Update CRM', 'Chase Opportunities', 'Find Leads', 'Personalized Outreach'] }, { id: 'clide', name: 'Clide', role: 'AI Customer Support Specialist', avatar: '/images/three.png', color: '#DC2626', skills: ['Respond to Tickets', 'Escalate Issues', 'Take Actions', 'Solve Problems'] }, { id: 'suki', name: 'Suki', role: 'AI Marketing Associate', avatar: '/images/four.png', color: '#F59E0B', skills: ['Write Blog Posts', 'Run SEO', 'Manage Social Media', 'Write with Brand Voice'] }, { id: 'finance', name: 'Finance', role: 'AI Financial Operations', avatar: '/images/five.png', color: '#10B981', skills: ['KYC/KYB', 'Invoice Processing', 'Tax Returns', 'Audit Support'] }, { id: 'hr', name: 'HR', role: 'AI Human Resources', avatar: '/images/six.png', color: '#8B5CF6', skills: ['Recruitment', 'Employee Onboarding', 'Performance Reviews', 'Policy Management'] }, { id: 'analyst', name: 'Analyst', role: 'AI Competitor Analysis', avatar: '/images/one.png', color: '#3B82F6', skills: ['Market Research', 'Competitor Tracking', 'Trend Analysis', 'Strategic Insights'] }, { id: 'voice', name: 'Voice', role: 'AI Voice Calling', avatar: '/images/two.png', color: '#DC2626', skills: ['Voice Calls', 'Call Transcription', 'Sentiment Analysis', 'Call Analytics'] } ]; return (

AI Agent Templates

Choose from our pre-built templates or create your own custom AI agent

{templates.map((template) => (

{template.name}

{template.role}

What I can do

{template.skills.map((skill, index) => (
{skill}
))}

and hundreds more skills...

))}
); }; export default Templates;
